productName: SUBX [DOH] SUPREME Bang Stick - Colorado Nightshifter - 2pk
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Colorado Nightshifter, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
